item.title: Share how you got yours
item.description: How to get all four hamster trophies: 1. Post anything with #server_hamster as one of your tags. 2. Use the "Unsatisfied Server Hamster" meme template. (Tap the upload icon on mobile --> Memes --> It's the yellow one top middle.) 3. ? 4. ? Help me figure out 3 through 4 and I'll update this description when we get the solution.
item.dc:creator: rhinokitty

item.title: Peak Performance
item.dc:creator: NSFWfrontpage2

item.title: Took two tries to get the 278.2nd eromeme album up. But it's worth the second attempt.
item.description:
Gotta do what I can, when I can, where I can, who I can. As usual, no eromeme OC here, just things I found here. On the internet.
Quack
It's DrBees!
Big topic: It's consent again. Last week, some things were said in my comments and in private messages to me that tell me this is a topic we need to visit a little more. Consent does not just mean "yes means go." Consent means "yes means go, for now." Conesnt means 4 yes's and a no means "stop right fucking now". Consent means "informed." If you lied or misled someone to get consent, you *do not have consent*. Consent means "capable." If they are out of sorts, drunk, high, emotionally vulnerable, being pressured out of fear for something direct or implied, *you do not have consent.* I am doing my best to remain gender neutral here because there are a ton of stereotypes about men v women and consent. And there's a lot more happening on the gender spectrum now that wasn't acknowledged when those stereotypes developed. But to be direct, men and women are both sexually objectified. Men and women both get forced into situations where they cannot consent because of one reason or another. Just because she's your wife (or gf, has done it with someone else, has done it with you before, or even is a proud flag-carrying slut) doesn't mean she doesn't get to say no. Just because "guys always want to fuck" (or is hard, or is being offered a threesome, or "should want it because every guy wants to fuck their hot teacher/boss") doesn't mean *he* doesn't get to say no. And it doesn't matter where you or they are on the gender scale, *all of this* applies to everyone. We all have the right to say NO at any point before or during sexual activities regardless of gender, or expectations, or prior agreement of consent. If you see or hear "No", or are pushing someone into a position where they can't express it safely, and you take advantage of them, that is assault. Be better. Do the right thing. Listen to your partner, don't abuse your position or station, don't lie to get laid. And if you see something, say something. We only move forward as a people if we do it all together, arm in arm. Album link to come later.

item.title: Monday JUICY MEME Dump #412
item.description:
1. but this annoying person in red keeps blocking the view!!!
2
3
4. Legit mastermind
5. Idiot in a BMW, what could go wrong?
6. Idiot with a gun, what could go wrong (Safe for life, don't worry)
7. When your dump gets 37 upvotes
8
9
10. Me vs. Hot People
11. Trying to get shit done on Monday be like
12. I wouldn't mess with a seagull but you do you
13. You picked the wrong day to F with me mothefucker
14. Dog navigating a field
15. As an indie dev, can confirm I mean what else are you supposed to write when you have like 50 different roles during development? Animation: Me Modeling: Me Coding: Me PR: Me Making coffee: Me Anyway, if you enjoy my dumps perhaps you would also enjoy my comedy wacky narrative game that I'm working on. Only 17 days until release!!! You can wishlist on Steam if you like :) https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1316 (friendly insults and jibes)
item.description:
Happy Trans Visibility Day! Let's get this bread.
I can't remember for the life of me why I screenshot this.
Me, every night.
This doesn't work in my building: everything is digital, but maybe it will work for you?
Anchisaurus.
The Creation Museum goes WAY HARDER than it needs to, and this is like something that would happen in my DnD world.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [kissy noises] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: We Built This City - 85 Vintage Images of 1980s Fashions!
item.description:
Beach models
Somewhere in Europe, 1987 (photo by Sergio Purtell)
Duran Duran's Nick Rhodes married Julie Ann Friedman in 1984 (divorced 1992)
New Romantics
1986
1984 (photo by Baldwin Lee)
Landers Sisters # 1 - for the uninitiated, Audrey (on left) and Judy Landers were everywhere in the 80s. They modeled, sang and acted.
Metropolis, Hollywood, CA, 1984 (photo by Robert Landau)
Dolly Parton, Emmylou Harris and Linda Ronstadt, 1987 (photo by Robert Blakeman)
Madonna filming Borderline video, Los Angeles, CA, 1984
North Wood High School students showing style, Nappanee, IN, 1983
1987
1985 douches - those white pants on the right are super see through so be careful choosing your undies!
Woman at home after workout, Malibu, CA, 1987 (phto by Joel Sternfeld)
Cigarette girl at the club, 1984 (photo by Ronnie Ginnever)
Her date is clearly a fan of the Stray Cats
Early Salt n Pepa, 1980
Landers Sisters # 2
Largest bow of all time, wow! NYC, 1984 (photo by Richard Sandler)
1986
Looks like they are playing quarters, Lowenbrau in the back (photo by Sergio Purtell)
Spring break, Galveston, TX, 1988
These two are both 15. Cambridge Rindge and Latin School, Cambridge, MA, 1983 (photo by Olive Pierce)
Bikini girls at Jones Beach, NY, 1988 (photo by Joseph Szabo)
Teen fashion in the 1987 Alameda High School yearbook, Alameda, CA
Landers Sisters # 3
Eddie Van Halen and Valerie Bertinelli, 1985
1987
Model Jerry Hall, 1985
These guys were in the hallway of every 80s high school
1986
Westwood Mall, Michigan, early 1980s
Princess Di in red - red pantyhose aren't good for anyone, no matter the decade, 1986
1984
1984 at the mall
1983 office workers
80s couple (photo by Bill Cunningham)
Landers Sisters # 4
The office, 1980s - the flowers are an interesting touch (photo by Joel Sternfeld)
My eyes are up here, pal
German model
1986
1980s men style
Michael Jackson and Ola Ray making the Thriller video, 1983
Early 80s concert tailgate
Washington DC teens, 1985
More New Romantics, early 80s
80s office ladies with their sneakers (photo by Bill Cunningham)
Pacha Club, Ibiza, Spain, 1985
The Orchids, 1980
Young man from Brooklyn, NYC - love his buttons! 1988 (photo by Dawoud Bey)
Finely dressed at the clam bar, 1988 (photo by Mary Ellen Mark)
Landers Sisters # 5
Hip hop group UTFO, Brooklyn, NYC, 1984 (photo by Janette Beckman)
Wall Street summer interns, NYC, 1986 (photo by Joel Sternfeld)
The top and the Mom jeans don't go together very well. Whatever, it's Heather Locklear, right? 1980
Depeche Mode in 1981
1986 party
New Romantic at the Blitz club, London, 1980 (photo by Derek Ridgers)
Waiting behind the rope at Studio 54, 1981 (photo by Richard Sandler)
Model Pat Cleveland in dress by Marc Bouwer, NYC, 1982
Jessica at the Wag Club, London, 1983
80s model in red
The half shirts on guys.....meh.
Moms in knit sweaters and pink pearls
Human mannequin! New Jersey mall, 1980 (photo by Joel Sternfeld)
1987
Boombox boys with sunglasses, NYC, 1983 (photo by Morris Engel)
1988
German model
High school smoking section!
Annabella Lwin of Bow Wow Wow, 1986
Brockton High School yearbook, Massachusetts, 1987
Landers Sisters # 6
1985
Pastel jumpsuits and big belts, 1985 - summer camp!
Three snow bunnies at Elmer's, Camelback, PA, 1986
Tuinol Barry, Chelsea, London, 1983 (photo by Derek Ridgers)
1986, matchy matchy
Actors Jami Gertz and Jason Patric, 1986
Phone call, 1987 (photo by Henry Wessel)
Designer Issey Miyake and model Kathy Ireland, 1985
McDonald's crew, 1983
Rap duo Double Destiny (photo by Janette Beckman)
Lady shopping with her rabbit, Santa Monica, CA, 1988 (photo by Joel Sternfeld)

item.title: CIS man, veteran, father of 5 boys in Texas. See below so you’ll see what I’m teaching the future
item.description:
The day is coming! I will NOT standby as they snatch people off the streets!
This is the tool we use when the courts fail us or he declares martial law. This gun fights for gay/trans/black/brown/ Asian/ Canadian/ Mexican/greenlander godammit the list is long. I am a proud ALLY! Go ahead musky, put me on a list, but send a battalion!

item.title: Diversity in the Muslim community
item.description: Eid al fitr" is currently taking place for Muslims. These are holidays after Ramandan. This video with the diversity of the Muslim community made me very happy and I wanted to share it with you. And even if we have reason to be happy now. We should also think of the people who are suffering. If you can please donate to trusted charities for Palestine, Thailand and Myanmar. Asalamu Alaikum!

item.title: Happy Trans Day of Visibility!
item.description: Just a post of trans memes. I'll be celebrating quietly since I'm not out at work yet, but it's not going to be much longer until I can't hide anymore.
item.dc:creator: SharkLove

item.title: Blue eyes
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: Being brave is overrated
item.description:
Ran across this satirical article a while back, which I wish was less pointedly accurate if I'm being honest
It definitely hit pretty close to home
Remember, all the trans folks today baring themselves in public for the Trans Day of Visibility, we'd rather not have to. Deepest props to everyone who has posted today, even and especially the allies; it's good to know we're not alone. Source: https://reductress.com/post/trans-woman-would-actually-rather-be-safe-than-brave/
item.dc:creator: CleverSquirrel

item.dc:creator: SthenoTattoo

item.title: A tragic descent into madness depicted by a talented artist
item.description:
I think about Bryan Charnley a lot. He gave us such a good look into the harrowing experience of having untreated schizophrenia. While we learned many things from this art project, it was such a terrible idea from the get-go. It’s not shocking at all that it ended in tragedy. In many of my posts, I’m telling the story of a historical event. This time, I don’t need to tell the story, because he told it himself. I’m just sharing what he wrote.
I included the diary entries to each image in the captions. I copied and pasted them directly from the website, and made no alterations whatsoever. There are a few that required some context, and I added it below under: Editor's Note.
This is where the “memes” and “educational” tag come in. There is so much stigma about schizophrenia that I feel like it would be irresponsible of me to not include an overview of the disorder. Understanding what schizophrenia is/isn’t will help you understand Bryan’s last portraits a little better. For those that want to skip ahead, just go to the trigger warning which is Image 10.
Schizophrenia is also a thought disorder, so it leads to other symptoms as well. One notorious symptom of schizophrenia is called “word salad,” where the person speaks in incomprehensible sentences. Example: Running lately people purpose purple This is due to the fact that the thoughts are so disorganized that it can’t be pieced together in a helpful manner.
Schizophrenia decreases life expectancy by 10 years, and the leading cause of death in these patients is suicide. It’s also true that schizophrenics are 14x more likely to be the victim of a violent crime rather than the perpetrator of one. . One significant study on schizophrenia and homicide was done over a 40 year period, where 10% of these murders were committed by someone with schizophrenia. They came to this conclusion (warning, it’s a mouthful): The rise and fall in rates of homicide by people diagnosed with schizophrenia in parallel to total homicide suggests that homicidal behaviour might not be intrinsic to the clinical manifestations of the illness, and might instead reflect a heightened vulnerability to social factors that are associated with homicide by people without schizophrenia. . Plain English: There are social factors that lead a person to commit murder, mentally ill or not. The act of killing someone else is technically a social interaction, just a terrible one. This study believes that schizophrenic patients are more vulnerable to these social factors, and that’s why they might commit homicide. They don’t think that having schizophrenia automatically leads to committing or attempting murder.
Self Portrait 11th – 16th April 1991 Conventional portrait painted in two sittings. Is it a good likeness? Drug dosage was two 3 mg. tablets of Depixol daily plus two 25 mg. Tryptisol. I was sleeping a lot.
Self Portrait 20th April 1991 Cut back to one 3 mg. tablet of Depixol withTremazepam tablets to get some sleep. Very paranoid. The person upstairs was reading my mind and speaking back to me to keep me in a sort of ego crucifixion. I felt this was because I was discharging very strong vibrations which could easily be interpreted. I tried to express this in the painting. The large rabbit ear is because I was confused and extremely sensitive to human voices, like a wild animal. I also felt I was being read generally by E.S.P. I had cut back to one tablet of Depixol on 17th April 1991 and was now just beginning to feel the dramatic effects of such a sudden withdrawal. . . Editor's Note: E.S.P = Extrasensory Perception, aka experiencing clairvoyance or a "sixth sense."
Self Portrait 23rd April 1991 (All painting with exception of the first painted in one day with no further alterations). I had originally had the idea for a series of self portraits from Louis Wain’s series of portraits of cats that changed strangely as he became more and more psychotic. They seemed to show a disintegrating ego. I expected something similar, that is the reliance on a sort of hallucinatory geometry but instead found that I was almost completely unable to concentrate so the painting takes on the crudeness of bad graffiti. I ascribe this to the fact that Depixol strengthens concentration and so its removal means that the power of concentration breaks down. However I would mention that this, as in Louis Wain’s case was not my problem when I originally became ill but seems to have resulted from Depixol dependency. Still on one tablet of Depixol plus sleeping pills. I had come to the conclusion that most people around me had some extra sensory perception ability which gave them access to my mind. In this respect I was like blind man. Hence the crosses on the eyes. They also let me know verbally what they had pi ked up from my thoughts. I was like a dumb man in this respect and hence the cross over the mouth. The crossed out dates are because I was becoming obsessed that I had taken two sittings rather than one on the first self portrait.
Self Portrait 24th April 1991 Why miss a golden opportunity to describe through paint total mental disintegration. Painted the day after the last portrait, the horns of E.S.P. are supposed to function as mouths. Total lack of concentration meant a graffiti effect again. The spots on the brain of the head are real blood to try and get over the mental pain I was experiencing. I was smoking heavily, hence the pipe. No eyes to see what is really going on and a stitched up mouth. The blood is my own. I stabbed the base of my thumb. Not the kind of thing you are able to do on the tranquillisers. Still on only one tablet of Depixol and sleeping pill (tremazepam) but know I cannot go on much longer.
Self Portrait 29th April 1991 Things had really being getting out of hand. A strange spiritual force was making me feel I should not smoke or I would incur a disaster. This was driving me crazy as I am normally a heavy smoker. I walked and walked, throwing my pouch of tobacco away. I had taken 15 tables of Depixol on 24th April to try and throw off the spiritual demands which were driving me crazy along with the E.S.P.but to no avail. I kept taking high dosages the next few days but nothing was having any effect and I felt I might have to got to hospital. When I arrived home from one of my long walks my twin phoned. I told him how I felt and he said some words of truth that completely cut through the situation to the bone and rendered the spiritual forces thankfully impotent. I wrote, to complement “Love hurts” of 23.4.91, “Love is Strange” because this was the first real help I had been given in my illness. Everybody else seemed to try and make me feel worse. It is also reference to the statement by Christ that love is the truth. I wanted really to say that truth is power, is beauty, is love but left it as it is because I think the song of the same name is so great any way. The doctors just prescribe more and more drugs when the patients comes up with something he can’t handle. What I think is interesting is that the drugs, no matter how high the dosage had no effect. What made the change was rational insight, the truth. The beauty of truth. The doctors of course will mutter the drugs just began to take effect but I do not believe this for an instant. I believe instead that the answer to my condition is rational insight but the doctors seem unwilling, or unable to help me here. Certainly many different schizophrenias exist and some cannot be attacked by rational insight for reason has broken down but why should everybody be lumped in the same druggy boat? I am overwhelmed by things I cannot understand. Understanding what was going on, the truth of the... [caption ended here]. . . EDITOR'S NOTE: Bryan Charnley had a twin brother in real life, who did not develop schizophrenia to my knowledge. That's who "the twin" is referring to. Due to the stigma of needing medication, I felt that it was important to note that a common psychotic delusion is that doctors medicate everyone for every thing. Keep in mind that "no matter how high the dose had no effect" is being written by someone who is not being properly treated for their mental illness. You can see that the medications actually did have a positive effect just by comparing his written captions from his earlier paintings. They're much less erratic and disorganized.
Self Portrait 2nd May 1991 After the mental release the chemistry of drugs really began to take effect and though I had now cut back to my dose when I started, 6 mg. Depixol, 60 mg. Tryptisol, I was almost completely without energy. This explains the simile technique. I hadn’t the energy for anything else. This is expressed by the pupa. The torpid state in insects. The spirit, expressed by a bird is crushed by the maggot. My Oedipus complex is represented by the hooded phallus. My conflict of thought expressed by the man with two heads, one is a nose. The clothes line is to say that all my dirty washing, or thoughts are on display. The split crosses are a reference to schizophrenia being a type of ego crucifixion. The man with the hat is watching me and keeping everything under his hat. Additionally the split in the cross expresses lack of real direction, of a split in the will, as with the man with a nose head. . . EDITOR'S NOTE: Bryan felt a fascination and inspiration with Sigmund Freud, the severely psychologically disturbed cocaine addict who is known as "the father of psychoanalysis." He is especially notorious for his bizarre theories around sexual maturity. One of Freud's most bogus and unsettling theories is that young men have an "Oedipus Complex", where they want to have sex with their own mothers. Sigmund Freud may have founded the concept of psychoanalysis, but any sane psychologist would tell you that he is bogus. I'd even call him a menace to psychiatry because of the damages that his bizarre cocaine-fueled theories still have on society's perception of psychology and mental health treatment. While schizophrenia can lead to sexually inappropriate behavior, there have been no reports of Bryan actually feeling desire for his mother. I believe that Bryan thought that he had an Oedipus Complex because Sigmund Freud says he has one.
Self Portrait 6th May 1991 I feel like a target for peoples cruel remarks. Especially negroes. What is going on? I had sweet talked a girl to suicide because I had no tongue, no real tongue, and could only flatter. This is very much involved with why I am ill. The nail in the mouth expresses this. The people around me cannot understand how I was so stupid and cannot forgive me. I can only say that I cannot socialise at all because of my weakness verbally and this is been, produced a tragedy. Thus I am a target. The nails in my eyes express that I cannot see whereas other people seem to have extra sensory perception and I am blind in this respect. Love hurts. I keep well way now from women on the advice of my psychiatrist. On two Depixol tablets plus two tablets of anti-depressants, Tryptisol. . . EDITOR'S NOTE: Bryan had a long time girlfriend named Pam, who also had mental health issues. Eight years into their relationship, Pam attempted suicide by jumping out a window. She survived, but broke her back and experiences permanent damages related to that event. Bryan blamed himself for her suicide attempt, because he felt that had he been more comitted to her, she wouldn't have done it. The event severely traumatized him. There is no evidence to suggest that he actually talked her into attempting suicide.
Self Portrait 14th May 1991 The ego splitting like a cancer cell as it comes under attack, a gory mess. The Roman soldiers leg expresses my fear of the Mafia who maintain their tyranny by attaching great importance to the sanctity of a woman’s good heath and good name and thus get a foot in the door for murder and organised crime. I also feel Rome was the real decider and actually crucified the Christ. My ego is being crucified. My feelings, my Oedipus complex is summed up by the leg of an Italian. Italians are very up tight about their daughters and I injured one through my ignorance of social mores. The girl, who broke her back in a suicide attempt, was not Italian but if she had been I expect I would have been brutally and effectively dealt with Thus the Roman leg generates anxiety. I am on the wrong side anyway and cannot hope for anything but total defeat as the sacred cow must never die. I am a target with no hope of victory only total humiliation. I completely acquiesce to this but am still deeply hurt all the time.
Self Portrait 18th May l991 From 10th May I had cut down to one anti-depressant (tryptisol) and so was not sleeping so much. My mind seemed to be thought broadcasting very severely and it was beyond my will to do anything about it. I summed this up by painting my brain as an enormous mouth, acting independently of me. The trouble seemed to me rightly or wrongly, to stem from a broken heart on my left so I painted a great mass of gore there to express this. The foot that connects to this is pushing the mouth open for the thoughts to be broadcasted. I feel I am always divided against my self by myself. Again the nail in the mouth expresses my social ineptitude and an in ability to socialise which makes me a target. Still I feel I am giving off strong personality vibrations, hence the wavy lines emanating from my head.
Self Portrait 23rd May 1991 I really tire of having to explain my paintings. It is very much my tragedy that people cannot understand the straight forward poetic use of symbols I am employing. The blue of the portrait is there because I felt depressed through cutting back on the anti-depressants. The wavy lines are because just as I felt I was safe a voice from the street gutted me emotionally by its E.S.P. of my condition. (I was feeling proud of the painting and he showed he knew this convincingly enough to convince me I must be giving off very strong thought messages or vibrations of some readable kind). I was pleased that I was able to express such a purely mental concept as thought broadcasting by the simple device of turning the brain into a mouth that I painted it again. One is very much up against the almost impossible task of describing in paint that which essentially totally invisible. Symbols come to be employed and the appropriate one must be found, also it should have a poetic charge attached to it. Yet still people are too ignorant to see. At this stage my central worry was thought broadcasting. This would pass as I gained insight and effects of drug withdrawal wore off. I was much worried about radio and television because I seemed to intertwine with their broadcasted waves and expose myself completely which I found humiliating. People laughed at me when this happened or let me know it was for real by acute remarks. I continued my retreat from social contact.
Self Portrait 24th May 1991 Perhaps a broken heart is the cause of it all. Certainly it hurts. This is expressed best as I can on the left side. The spiders legs on the right are to express my inhibitions and the feeling that comes over me as my thoughts surface and broadcast. Scary. I feel all the time now that I am getting nearer to a more acute expression of my schizophrenia. From 19th May 1991 I had cut down to 1 1/2 tabs of Depixol plus one tab 25 mg. of Tryptisol.
Self Portrait 8th June 1991 The spiders legs seem to be my central condition. I attempted to suggest that they radiated out and became less potent as they departed from my brain. I found that this idea that they sort of dissipated as they removed from the core comforting. The flaming darts of E.S.P. made vocal and right a the point of the birth of the thought too in this case. The white parts represent my thoughts. The triangles meet to produce the discharge of a rational thought that feels like truth and a flaming dart from someone pierces it at inception. The spiders legs represent inhibition, social and otherwise. Is this is truth of my condition? I was to find out otherwise but it was certainly part of the truth.
Self Portrait 13th June 1991 People crane their necks to try and appreciate technique, raving about Picasso’s which is poetic discharge via symbols. They swallow a camel to strain a gnat and say I cannot paint, that my technique is at the service of my imagination. Perhaps it should be the other way round but then I find Picasso peculiarly bland stripped of his technique. Well the later paintings anyway. There is nothing wrong with my technique except when I have to try too hard because of the demands of the imagery. People keep me in misery because they keep coming up to me with some gossip about my past and I know nothing of theirs. The eggs have been emptied like a head stripped of its contents. It has nothing left in it, no more secrets, they went to satisfy somebody’s appetite, some body that has power over me. They enjoyed every tasty mouthful. Two eggs? It was the same yesterday. Needless to say I feel suicidal so I painted in Van Gogh’s crows from his final, suicide picture of the wheat field. E.S.P. horns, voices as mouths grinning. Birds come from eggs so the crows can also be like my thoughts flying away. All this sort of gossip increases my fears of telepathy and is the main reason I feel suicidal. Still on 1 1/2 tabs Depixol (3 mg.each). On 24th May cut out anti-depressant, Tryptisol, completely.
Self Portrait 19th June 1991 Do they just want to party? An intrusion into my mental interior life, like everybody has a foot in the door. Nailed mouth and tongue tied I have no effective reply to them.
Self Portrait 27th June 1991 An extremely complicated picture as I feel I am closing in on the essential image of my schizophrenia. I am transparent firstly. Make crazy attempts at some sort of control over what has become an impossible situation (the man with the control stick). My brain, my ego is transfixed by nails as the Christ who could not move freely on the cross without severe pain. My self respect my ego my feelings about me are crucified as the Christ. From here on in enlightenment about my condition creeps in and imagery become even more difficult to find. I realised that the fear caused by the anger (symbolised by the red tied beast, muzzled because the anger arises through not being able to reply to the abuse heaped on me) this fear is causing me to hallucinate telepathy and E.S.P. which is not there. Or not there when I am no longer in fear. I express this as best I can through the mouths on the end of the enormous bent up eyebrows. My senses are being bent by fear into hallucinations. Like eyelashes it is something about the bending taking place at the periphery of my sight. That is why I had been feeling blind all the time. Anger, “He’s mad at you, he’s mad”, is cause of fear, the anger being in a latent, unconscious state, but giving rise to paranoia which in turn gives rise to characteristic schizophrenic hallucinations and symptoms. But I am still at an acute disadvantage socially. Can this ever change or will the anger always remain? I intend to record my progress with more self portraits to add up when they are all joined together as an important document as to life, at the end of the twentieth century. “Self Portrait” will state with depth what it is to be human and schizophrenic. One 1 1/4 tabs Depixol (3 mg. each) from 22nd June 1991
Self Portrait 12th July 1991 The central text reads: The cards are no good that I’m holding unless they are from another world This is a line from Series of Dreams by Bob Dylan, the last track on The Bootleg Series, Volumes I-3. . Editor’s Note: The above was the caption from the website.
Self Portrait 19th July 1991 Bryan Charnley did not write any commentary for the last two portraits. Tracing back the recurrence of the final two predominating colours Red and Yellow throughout the series. They seem to be associated with acute mental anguish. See particularly 14th May and 12th July portraits. . Editor’s Note: The above was the caption from the website.
Typically when I do research on an individual person like this, I also try to find information on who they were - personality, favorite things, etc… so that I can write a little obituary for them. Because Bryan’s writings were coming from a place of untreated schizophrenia, I don’t feel like I got to know him as well as I would’ve liked to. I wish I could say more on him than this: I took a look through his entire gallery, and was blown away by his skill. I also know that he was loved and cherished by many people. I hope he’s resting in peace. . . Unfortunately, I also have to sully this little memorial by a disclaimer. I said “brave enough to teach the world about a brutal mental illness” as a means of being kind to someone who has already passed. I do not condone this project. It was a TERRIBLE idea. It should’ve never been done, and the fact that it ended in his suicide is a harrowing lesson to what happens when someone with a severe mental illness STOPS taking their medication. Bryan Charnley’s death was easily preventable, and I’m stating that to deter others that might feel “inspired” to do something similar. DON’T.
The Bryan Charnley Website: https://www.bryancharnley.info/self-portraits-2/charnley_self_portrait_series_01/ A Study on Schizophrenia and Suicide: https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6681260/ An Overview on Schizophrenia and Violence: https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC3160236/ The Schizophrenia and Homicide Study: https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC8693909/ Schizophrenia and Word Salad: https://psychcentral.com/schizophrenia/word-salad-schizophrenia#causes-of-word-salad This is an interesting schizophrenia simulation made by combining the experiences that real schizophrenic patients have reported: https://youtu.be/M3a1txtSDn0?si=nN2Z3sWs56fnVLV8 For any neuropsychologist reading this, I found this article on schizophrenia and the dopamine hypothesis super interesting, even though I only understood some of it: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0079612309179074
item.dc:creator: OlivetheNerd

item.title: Happy International TransgenderDay of Visibility
item.description:
Sorry I'm late. Just by 38 years.
I apologize in advance but this is trans-fem heavy. I do have a couple trans-masc and enby things thrown in there but I saved what I identified with. You are still loved and valid.
Currently where I'm at. I hate myself and my body so much that I worry I'm just idealizing being someone else and not just being me like I was supposed to be.
Bofadeez please.
I wish I could grow hair. Stupid baldness genes.
item.dc:creator: NegligentEpidemic

item.title: Meow…
